overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a skyscraper ledge overlooking a bustling Times Square-like urban intersection. High-quality game engine footage featuring modern glass architecture, vibrant digital billboards, and busy street traffic below in a sunlit downtown environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: skyscraper ledge overlooking busy urban intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man is crouched on a building ledge, surveying the busy street below with occasional slight shifts in posture

entered.detail: Tall modern glass building with reflective windows extending vertically along the left side of the frame
Concrete building ledge with metal railings where Spider-Man is perched
Tall glass building facade covered with multiple large digital billboards and advertisements
Large red digital billboard displaying STRANGE advertisement visible down the avenue
Purple digital billboard on the right building showing animated content
Wide multi-lane urban street extending into the distance with moving traffic and crosswalks

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man crouches on a concrete ledge high above a bustling urban intersection resembling Times Square. The view looks down a canyon of modern glass skyscrapers lined with vibrant digital billboards, while traffic flows steadily on the multi-lane street below. The scene is brightly lit by midday sun with clear visibility of the downtown architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static yet immersive perspective from a high-altitude perch overlooking a vibrant, sun-drenched urban canyon. It begins with Spider-Man crouching on a concrete ledge, establishing a dramatic height above a bustling intersection reminiscent of Times Square. As the camera settles, the view expands down the corridor of modern glass skyscrapers, highlighting the contrast between the solid architecture and the glowing digital billboards. The scene then draws the eye further down toward the multi-lane street, where steady traffic flows through the brightly lit downtown environment under a clear midday sun.
